name: Sanchi Stupa
description: A masterpiece of Buddhist art and architecture, these UNESCO World Heritage monuments include the Great Stupa, famous for its intricately carved gateways (Toranas).
history: Originally commissioned by Emperor Ashoka in the 3rd century BC. It is one of the oldest stone structures in India and a major center of Buddhist learning.
famousFor: Great Stupa, Ashoka Pillar, and ancient Buddhist art.
